chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Crl. Transfer A. No.S-01 of 2021. Date Order with the signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA-686/2021 2. For orders on MA-183/2021 3. For orders on office objection 4. For orders on MA-184/2021 5. For hearing of main case 6. For orders on MA-185/2021. 26.01.2021. Mr. Muhammad Hashim Laghari, Advocate for the applicant. = Urgency granted. It is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that the applicant oftenly is being threatened by the private respondent while attending the Court at Mithi. By stating so, he sought for transfer of the case of the applicant from Mithi to any other Court of competent jurisdiction for its disposal according to law. The case is fresh one of year 2020 and no date, time and place of the threats allegedly issued to the applicant by the private respondents is disclosed in the instant transfer application. No criminal case could be ordered to be transferred from one to other Court, on the basis of self procured ground. Consequently, the instant transfer application is dismissed in limine along with the listed applications. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
